_comment: Life-state variant: Thunder Ape (Mutated). Generated from canonical species definition. Prime Directive: this state exists objectively; perception tier determines whether player recognizes it.
description: Bloodline-awakened, altered form; cultivates by absorbing the mutation source

perception_tiers.qi_condensation: Sees a aggressive beast of thunder ape kind.
perception_tiers.core_formation: Recognizes species, life-state, and approximate cultivation.
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Sees bloodline, mutation potential, and treasure affinity.
perception_tiers.spirit_severing: Sees complete ecology and Dao-comprehension state.
